description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a rectangular, landscaped lot featuring a mix of green lawns, trees, and flowering shrubs. The house has a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows and sliding glass doors that open to a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. The front of the property includes a paved driveway with space for multiple cars and a small entry path lined with decorative plants. The backyard is equipped with a pool, poolside lounge chairs, and a shaded seating area, while the side yard features additional greenery and a small garden. The exterior walls are primarily white with some accent colors, and the property is enclosed by a low boundary wall. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool. The property features a driveway, patio, and abundant greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with cars parked and flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, large windows, and backyard pool area with patio furniture and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, patio, and lush backyard with seating and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side garden, and the bungalow's flat roof and modern lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
